metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.displayName: AWS EKS Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorUiConfig.title: AWS EKS Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The AWS EKS data connector provides the capability to ingest audit logs from [Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service](https://aws.amazon.com/eks/) into Microsoft Sentinel. This connector focuses on EKS audit logs (JSON format) which contain detailed information about API server requests, authentication decisions, and cluster activities. The connector uses AWS SQS to receive notifications when new audit log files are exported to S3, ensuring real-time security monitoring and compliance tracking for your Kubernetes clusters.

sampleQueries.description: Get sample of AWS EKS messages

dataTypes.name: AWSEKSLogs_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AWSEKSLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: 1. AWS CloudFormation Deployment
instructionSteps.description: Use the provided CloudFormation templates to configure the AWS environment for sending logs from AWS EKS to your Log Analytics Workspace.

parameters.content:
#### Deploy CloudFormation Templates in AWS: 
1. Navigate to the [AWS CloudFormation Stacks](https://aka.ms/awsCloudFormationLink#/stacks/create).
2. Click **Create stack** and select **With new resources**.
3. Choose **Upload a template file**, then click **Choose file** to upload the appropriate CloudFormation template(Template 1 and 2 below) provided.
4. Follow the prompts and click **Next** to complete the stack creation.
5. After the stacks are created, navigation to the **Outputs** section. Run the scripts in step 1 and 2 from the output section, it stream log from eks to sqs.
6. In the same outputs section, Note down the **Role ARN** and **SQS Queue URL** which are going to be used in connect connector.

parameters.label: Template 1: OpenID Connect authentication provider deployment
Template 2: AWS EKS Resources Deployment

instructionSteps.title: 2. Connect new collectors
instructionSteps.description: To enable AWS Security Hub Connector for Microsoft Sentinel, click the Add new collector button, fill the required information in the context pane and click on Connect.

parameters.label: SentinelRoleArn
parameters.placeholder: The AWS IAM Role ARN for cross-account access (e.g., arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/SentinelRole)
parameters.name: roleArn

parameters.label: SentinelSQSQueueURL
parameters.placeholder: The full AWS EKS queue URL (e.g., https://sqs.region.amazonaws.com/account-id/queue-name)
parameters.name: queueUrl

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now() | project TimeGenerated , AwsAccountId , Region , ClusterName , Verb , User , SourceIPs , UserAgent , ObjectRef , ResponseCode , Stage , AuthDecision , RawEvent

schema.name: AWSEKSLogs_CL
schema.description: AWS EKS Messages connector table for ingesting messages from Amazon EKS

properties.displayName: AWS EKS Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorDefinitionName.defaultValue: AWS EKS Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The AWS EKS solution for Microsoft Sentinel allows you to ingest Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) audit logs into Microsoft Sentinel. This connector provides the capability to monitor and analyze Kubernetes cluster activities, API server calls, and security events from your EKS environments for comprehensive security monitoring and threat detection.

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
